TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Cikadaan, title = Cikadaan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cikadaan} }

S.FORM: Cikadaan I tiniay i Changbin Siang no Taitung ko Cikadaan a niyaro', 51 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 124 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 83% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 103 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 17% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 21 ko tamdaw. O pasinto no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko 'Amis 65%,Bunun 10%,Tayal 1%,Paiwan 2%,Truku 2%, roma 4%. Talihafan
S.PHON: ¶ika…¨~…ģaan i tiniaj i ¶ńßaŇčb~b~vin siaŇč no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u ¶ika…¨~…ģaan a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pasinto~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u °amis **%,b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%,taja…ĺ *%,paiwan *%,tro~u~uko~u~u *%, ro~uma *%. ta…ĺińßafan
S.FORM: Cikadaan I tiniay i Changbin Siang no Taitung ko Cikadaan a niyaro', 51 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 124 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 83% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 103 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 17% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 21 ko tamdaw. O pasinto no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko 'Amis 65%,Bunun 10%,Tayal 1%,Paiwan 2%,Truku 2%, roma 4%. Talihafan
S.PHON: ¶ika…¨~…ģaan i tiniaj i ¶ńßaŇčb~b~vin siaŇč no~u taito~u~uŇč ko~u ¶ika…¨~…ģaan a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pasinto~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u °amis **%,b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%,taja…ĺ *%,paiwan *%,tro~u~uko~u~u *%, ro~uma *%. ta…ĺińßafan
